title: lasianthus oblongifolius
intro: Lasianthus oblongifolius, also known as the Round Leaf Lasianthus, is a plant species in the family Theaceae. It is a type of evergreen shrub that is native to the tropical regions of Asia, and has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is said to have anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties, which contribute to its potential health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and boosting the immune system. In traditional herbal preparations, the leaves of the Lasianthus oblongifolius plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory issues and digestive problems.
